name: Luminarum
description: Geometric canvas with vibrant faceted color accents. Breathing gradient orbs, outlined cards with colored strokes, particle network details. Tech-forward meets visual candy. Dual dark/light modes: warm charcoal dark, warm off-white light.
personality: sharp + bold elevation + breathing motion + colored strokes + geometric gradients

decorators.lum-canvas: Particle network background (dark: #141414, light: #FAFAF9). Scattered small dots and thin connecting lines in brand colors at low opacity. Apply to page root.
decorators.lum-glass: Subtle glass panel (dark: rgba(255,255,255,0.03), light: rgba(0,0,0,0.02)) with soft border. No heavy blur — clean transparency.
decorators.lum-orbs: Breathing gradient orbs behind hero/feature sections. Large radial gradients in primary/secondary/accent at 15-22% opacity, slowly pulsing and drifting.
decorators.lum-particles: Fixed-position small dots (2-8px) in brand colors scattered across the viewport at 15% opacity with subtle pulse animation.
decorators.lum-card-outlined: Outlined card with colored border stroke, transparent bg, colored heading. The stroke color comes from the section's accent.
decorators.lum-card-vibrant: Filled card with vibrant gradient background, white text, corner accent brackets.
decorators.lum-code-block: Code block (dark: #111113, light: #F5F5F4) with colored top border (2px) matching section accent. Monospace font, syntax highlighting.
decorators.lum-stat-glow: Number badge with filled circle in accent color, contrasting text inside.
decorators.lum-brand: Brand text with accent color on punctuation (e.g. 'decantr.ai' with coral period and 'i').
decorators.lum-fade-up: Scroll-reveal animation: fade in + translate up 24px over 0.6s.
decorators.lum-divider: Section divider: thin horizontal line with centered colored dot. Dot color matches the next section's accent.
decorators.lum-drawer: Right-side drawer panel. Fixed colors (#1E1E1E bg, #2E2E2E border-left) not tokens. Width 380px, full height, z-50, slide-in transition 200ms.
decorators.lum-drawer-scrim: Overlay behind drawer. Fixed inset-0, bg rgba(0,0,0,0.4), z-40, fade-in transition.
decorators.lum-theme-card: Theme card in drawer. Fixed bg #1E1E1E. Border 1px solid #2E2E2E, rounded, padding, cursor pointer. Hover: border brightens. Active: border-color var(--d-accent).
decorators.lum-swatch: Single color circle. 24px width/height, rounded-full, border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), inline-flex, align/justify center.
decorators.lum-swatch-strip: Row of color swatches. Display flex, gap 0.375rem, overflow hidden.
decorators.lum-preview-hero: Screenshot backdrop section. Position relative, overflow hidden, min-height 300px. Pseudo-element gradient overlay from transparent to var(--d-bg).
decorators.lum-preview-image: Crisp screenshot container. Border-radius var(--d-radius-lg), border 1px solid var(--d-border), box-shadow var(--d-shadow-lg), overflow hidden, max-width 100%.
decorators.lum-preview-banner: Floating preview indicator. Position fixed, bottom 1.5rem, left 50%, translateX(-50%). Pill shape, bg var(--d-surface), border var(--d-accent), z-50, box-shadow var(--d-shadow-md).
decorators.lum-bento-grid: Bento grid container. 4-column CSS Grid with 1rem gap, responsive to 2-col and 1-col. Position relative for cursor glow.
decorators.lum-bento-card: Individual bento card. Extends lum-glass with hover lift, border accent transition, and depth shadow.
decorators.lum-terminal: macOS terminal window chrome. Fixed dark background (#111113), rounded corners, subtle border and shadow.
decorators.lum-terminal-titlebar: Terminal title bar with traffic light dots area and centered title text. 40px height, flex layout.
decorators.lum-terminal-dots: Traffic light dots container. Three 12px circles: #FF5F57, #FFBD2E, #27C93F. Flex row with 8px gap.
decorators.lum-terminal-body: Terminal body content area. Monospace font, comfortable padding, generous line-height.
decorators.lum-backdrop-orbs: Full-bleed animated gradient orbs for content detail backdrops. Type-colored accent at 12-18% opacity with drift animation.
decorators.lum-backdrop-geo: Geometric SVG pattern overlay. Fixed-position, 6% opacity. Data-driven SVG per content type.
decorators.lum-backdrop-screenshot: Screenshot background for blueprint detail pages. Cover image with gradient overlay dissolving to var(--d-bg).
decorators.lum-quote: Pull-quote treatment for personality narratives. Accent-colored left border, decorative open-quote mark, slightly larger text.
decorators.lum-sparkline: Sparkline chart container. Fixed 60px height, full width, overflow hidden. Accent-colored line and area fill.
decorators.lum-stagger: Sequential stagger animation for child elements. 400ms fade-in + translateY(16px), 60ms delay between children.

hero.description: Split hero with large logo (1/3) and content (2/3). Canvas bg with breathing gradient orbs behind. Logo floats gently.

feature-grid.description: Grid of vibrant filled cards with corner brackets. Each card a different brand color.

pipeline.description: Grid of outlined cards showing process steps. Each card has a different accent color stroke with numbered badge.

tool-list.description: Two-column list with colored dot bullets and colored left border stripes on hover.

outlined.description: Transparent background with colored border stroke. Heading uses the stroke color. Content uses muted white. Hover fills with 5% of stroke color.

vibrant.description: Fully filled card with vibrant gradient background and white text. Corner accent brackets for geometric detail.

lum-canvas.description: Particle network background. Scattered small dots and thin connecting lines in brand colors at low opacity. Apply to page root. Dark: #141414, Light: #FAFAF9.
lum-canvas.intent: Use as the foundational page background to create the geometric canvas. The particle network adds depth and tech-forward energy.

lum-glass.description: Subtle glass panel. No heavy blur — clean transparency. Dark: rgba(255,255,255,0.03) bg. Light: rgba(0,0,0,0.02) bg.
lum-glass.intent: Use for navigation and panel surfaces that need subtle elevation without competing with the vibrant card accents.

lum-orbs.description: Breathing gradient orbs behind hero/feature sections. Large radial gradients in primary/secondary/accent at 15-22% opacity, slowly pulsing and drifting.
lum-orbs.intent: Use behind hero and feature sections to create living, breathing visual energy. Position as background decoration behind content.

suggested_properties.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, rgba(254, 68, 116, var(--lum-orb-opacity, 0.15)), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 60%, rgba(10, 243, 235, var(--lum-orb-opacity, 0.15)), transparent 60%)

lum-particles.description: Fixed-position small dots (2-8px) in brand colors scattered across the viewport at 15% opacity with subtle pulse animation.
lum-particles.intent: Use as a viewport-level decorative layer to add ambient visual interest. Fixed positioning keeps particles stable during scroll.

lum-card-outlined.description: Outlined card with colored border stroke, transparent bg, colored heading. The stroke color comes from the section's accent.
lum-card-outlined.intent: Use for content cards in grids where each card should have a distinct accent color stroke. Ideal for process steps and feature lists.

lum-card-vibrant.description: Filled card with vibrant gradient background, white text, corner accent brackets.
lum-card-vibrant.intent: Use for high-impact feature cards that need maximum visual energy. Each card uses a different brand color gradient.

lum-code-block.description: Code block with colored top border (2px) matching section accent. Monospace font, syntax highlighting. Dark: #111113 bg, Light: #F5F5F4 bg.
lum-code-block.intent: Use for code examples and syntax-highlighted blocks. The colored top border ties the code block to its section's accent color.

lum-stat-glow.description: Number badge with filled circle in accent color, contrasting text inside.
lum-stat-glow.intent: Use for numbered badges and step indicators. The filled circle with contrasting text creates a bold, readable counter.

lum-brand.description: Brand text with accent color on punctuation (e.g. 'decantr.ai' with coral period and 'i').
lum-brand.intent: Use for the brand name in navigation and headers. Colored punctuation creates a distinctive, memorable brand mark.

lum-fade-up.description: Scroll-reveal animation: fade in + translate up 24px over 0.6s.
lum-fade-up.intent: Use as the entrance animation for sections appearing on scroll. The larger translate creates a more dramatic reveal.

lum-divider.description: Section divider: thin horizontal line with centered colored dot. Dot color matches the next section's accent.
lum-divider.intent: Use between major page sections to create visual breathing room. The colored dot transitions the eye to the next section's accent.

lum-drawer.description: Right-side drawer panel for theme preview. Uses FIXED colors (#1E1E1E background, #2E2E2E border-left) not tokens, so it stays readable during theme swaps.
lum-drawer.intent: Use as a fixed overlay panel for theme preview. Fixed neutral colors ensure the drawer remains legible while injected theme tokens change the rest of the page.

lum-drawer-scrim.description: Semi-transparent overlay behind the drawer. Covers the full viewport to focus attention on the drawer content.
lum-drawer-scrim.intent: Use as a backdrop overlay behind the theme preview drawer. Click to dismiss. Provides visual separation between drawer and page content.

lum-theme-card.description: Theme card inside the drawer. Uses FIXED background #1E1E1E so the card itself does not shift during theme swaps. Border brightens on hover; active card shows accent border.
lum-theme-card.intent: Use for individual theme entries in the preview drawer. Each card shows the theme's color swatches, name, and description. Active variant uses accent border to indicate current selection.

lum-swatch.description: Single color circle displaying one palette color. Small 24px circle with a subtle border for visibility against dark backgrounds.
lum-swatch.intent: Use to render individual color samples within a swatch strip. The background-color is set dynamically per palette entry.

lum-swatch-strip.description: Horizontal row of color swatch circles. Displays 5-6 key palette colors for a theme at a glance.
lum-swatch-strip.intent: Use inside theme cards to show a compact horizontal preview of the theme's color palette. Overflow is hidden to keep the strip tidy.

lum-preview-hero.description: Screenshot backdrop section for blueprint detail pages. The screenshot fills the section as a faded background with a gradient overlay dissolving to var(--d-bg).
lum-preview-hero.intent: Use as the hero section on blueprint detail/showcase pages. The faded screenshot provides visual context while the gradient ensures content layered above remains readable.

lum-preview-image.description: Crisp screenshot container with rounded corners, border, and prominent shadow. Sits above the faded backdrop to show a clear preview.
lum-preview-image.intent: Use for the primary screenshot display on blueprint detail pages. The border and shadow lift the image above the faded backdrop, making it the focal point.

lum-preview-banner.description: Floating preview indicator pill. Fixed to the bottom center of the viewport to signal that the user is viewing a live theme preview.
lum-preview-banner.intent: Use as a floating notification banner when theme preview is active. The pill shape and fixed positioning ensure visibility without obstructing content.

lum-bento-grid.description: Bento grid container. 4-column CSS Grid with 1rem gap, responsive down to 2-col (1024px) and 1-col (640px). Position relative for cursor glow pseudo-element.
lum-bento-grid.intent: Use as the outer grid container on content detail pages. The bento layout arranges glass cards in a spatial grid over the immersive backdrop. Zero padding — the top-nav-main shell body region provides the outer 1.5rem padding.

lum-bento-card.description: Individual bento card. Extends lum-glass with card-specific hover lift, border accent transition, and depth shadow. The base glass treatment provides the subtle transparency.
lum-bento-card.intent: Use for every card within the bento grid. Combines the glass panel aesthetic with interactive hover behavior — cards lift, borders brighten to the type accent color, and shadows deepen on hover.

suggested_properties.transition: transform 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out

lum-terminal.description: macOS terminal window chrome. Fixed dark background (#111113) not tokens, rounded corners, subtle border and shadow. Overflow hidden to clip the title bar's top radius.
lum-terminal.intent: Use as the outer container for the install/prompt terminal card. Fixed neutral colors ensure the terminal looks authentic regardless of the active theme or mode.

lum-terminal-titlebar.description: Terminal title bar with traffic light dots area and centered title text. 40px height, flex layout, subtle border-bottom separating it from the terminal body.
lum-terminal-titlebar.intent: Use as the top section of the terminal card. Contains the three macOS traffic light dots on the left and a centered 'decantr' title in muted monospace. The slight background difference from the body creates visual depth.

lum-terminal-dots.description: Traffic light dots container. Three 12px circles in macOS colors: #FF5F57 (close/red), #FFBD2E (minimize/yellow), #27C93F (maximize/green). Flex row with 8px gap.
lum-terminal-dots.intent: Use inside the terminal title bar to render the three macOS window control dots. On copy feedback, all three dots temporarily turn green (#27C93F) for 1.5 seconds.

copied.description: All dots turn green for 1.5s after a successful copy action

lum-terminal-body.description: Terminal body content area. Monospace font, comfortable padding, generous line-height for readability. Contains the typed command text and blinking cursor.
lum-terminal-body.intent: Use as the main content area of the terminal card where the CLI command is displayed. The monospace font and line-height ensure the typing animation looks authentic.

lum-backdrop-orbs.description: Full-bleed animated gradient orbs for content detail backdrops. Two large radial gradients using the content type's accent color at 12-18% opacity, with slow drift animation. Positioned absolute behind all page content.
lum-backdrop-orbs.intent: Use as the immersive backdrop layer on content detail pages when no screenshot is available. The orbs use the per-type accent color (coral for patterns, amber for themes, etc.) instead of hardcoded primary/accent. Extends the lum-orbs concept to type-colored variants.

suggested_properties.background: radial-gradient(ellipse 500px 500px at 25% 20%, rgba(var(--lum-type-accent-rgb), 0.18), transparent 70%), radial-gradient(ellipse 400px 400px at 75% 70%, rgba(var(--lum-type-accent-rgb), 0.12), transparent 70%)

lum-backdrop-geo.description: Geometric SVG pattern overlay. Fixed-position, 6% opacity, pointer-events none. The SVG pattern is data-driven: connected nodes for patterns, concentric circles for themes, intersecting circles for blueprints, rectangular wireframes for shells, radial spokes for archetypes.
lum-backdrop-geo.intent: Use as a secondary backdrop layer composited over lum-backdrop-orbs. The SVG geometry derives from the content data (component count, palette size, page count, etc.), creating a unique ambient pattern per item. Fixed positioning keeps it stable during scroll.

lum-backdrop-screenshot.description: Screenshot background for blueprint detail pages that have a showcase image. The screenshot renders as background-image cover with a gradient overlay dissolving to var(--d-bg), plus a dark scrim for card readability.
lum-backdrop-screenshot.intent: Use as the backdrop layer on blueprint detail pages when a screenshot exists. The faded screenshot provides rich visual context while the gradient and scrim ensure glass cards layered above remain readable.

lum-quote.description: Pull-quote treatment for personality narratives and visual briefs. Accent-colored left border (3px), oversized decorative open-quote mark at top-left, slightly larger text (1.0625rem).
lum-quote.intent: Use for rendering personality text on blueprint detail pages and visual_brief text on pattern detail pages. The decorative quote mark and accent border create an evocative pull-quote aesthetic. The first sentence auto-highlights in the type accent color.

lum-sparkline.description: Sparkline chart container. Fixed 60px height, full card width, overflow hidden. Contains an inline SVG with a line in the type accent color and an area fill at 10% opacity.
lum-sparkline.intent: Use for the install trend sparkline card on content detail pages. The compact height and accent coloring keep the chart subtle but informative. Placeholder sine wave renders when no real data exists.

lum-stagger.description: Sequential stagger animation for child elements. Each direct child fades in with translateY(16px) over 400ms, with a 60ms delay between each child. Applied to the bento grid container.
lum-stagger.intent: Use on the bento grid to create a cascading reveal of cards on page load. Each card appears sequentially using CSS animation-delay calculated from its child index. Respects prefers-reduced-motion by showing all cards instantly.
